subsection.title: Only square matrices have determinants
2\times2 determinant
subsection.p: Geometric meaning:
The sign records orientation.

subsection.title: 3\times3 determinant
subsection.p: Geometric meaning:
The sign records orientation.

subsection.title: Determinant and orientation
Singular matrices
subsection.p: Equivalently, the linear map collapses some nonzero direction to zero.

subsection.title: Determinant properties
Effect of row operations
subsection.p: Swapping two rows changes the sign of the determinant.
Multiplying one row by c multiplies the determinant by c.
Adding a multiple of one row to another row does not change the determinant.

subsection.title: Determinant and linear independence
Determinant and change of variables

warning.title: Common warnings
warning.p:
The determinant is not linear in the whole matrix:
\det(A+B)\ne\det(A)+\det(B)
in general.
A determinant can be negative. Ordinary area and volume use |\det A|.
If row reduction uses row swaps or row scaling, track how the determinant changes.
